title: Two brothers say neighbors continue to dump on their property but they're getting fined
comment: Neighbors keep dumping on the brothers' land, and it's the brothers collecting the fines. The system found the victim first and stopped looking.
excerpt: Two brothers say neighbors continue to dump on their property but they're getting fined News4JAX

title: Central Florida man accused of impersonating nurse arrested again
comment: A Central Florida man was booked again for playing nurse without the license — or the training. "Again" is doing a lot of work in that sentence.
excerpt: Central Florida man accused of impersonating nurse arrested again Yahoo News Canada

title: Florida man repeatedly caught driving with suspended license arrested again: FCSO
comment: His license is suspended; his commitment to driving is not. Deputies keep finding him behind the wheel — the one place he's not allowed to be.
excerpt: Florida man repeatedly caught driving with suspended license arrested again: FCSO FOX 35 Orlando

title: Florida man allegedly dumped bag of urine, feces, and hot sauce on ex after breakup
comment: A breakup ended with a Florida man delivering urine, feces, and — for reasons known only to him — hot sauce. He garnished the grievance.
excerpt: Florida man allegedly dumped bag of urine, feces, and hot sauce on ex after breakup True Crime News
